principles.name: Think Before Coding
principles.notes: Gap analysis identified 8 issues before coding; each traced end-to-end

principles.name: Simplicity First
principles.notes: Minimal fixes — one-line changes where possible, no new abstractions

principles.name: Surgical Changes
principles.notes: 5 files touched, all directly related to identified gaps

principles.name: Goal-Driven Execution
principles.notes: Each fix verified programmatically; all checks pass

principles.name: Prefer shared utility packages over hand-rolled helpers

warnings.issue: No input validation for feature/plan_number used in branch names and paths
Worktree path has no boundary assertion to prevent traversal outside parent dir
Symlink created without checking if target already exists
Bare except Exception catches too broadly
Skipped tasks still carry blockedBy constraints from plan JSON
